//: Release version state, owned by .github/workflows/release.yml. current_version is the latest published release; next_version is what the next manual release will tag (the workflow then sets current_version=next_version and bumps next_version by a patch). To cut a minor/major, set next_version here first. This is the version source for the generated plugin.json. It is committed here (public repo) and excluded from the private mirror so the release workflow owns versioning.
